UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile details containing reading streak and daily target minutes

uid.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user

currentStreakDays.description: The continuous daily reading streak in days

dailyGoalMinutes.description: The target reading duration in minutes per day

Cart.title: Cart
Cart.description: Active shopping cart items saved for the user

items.description: List of cart items containing book metadata and quantity

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last modified

Wishlist.title: Wishlist
Wishlist.description: Saved manuscript wishlist for the user

books.description: List of books saved in the user's wishlist

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the wishlist was last modified

Progress.title: Progress
Progress.description: Reading progress and active manuscripts details for the user

history.description: List of book progress objects showing pages read

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when reading progress was last updated

BookReviews.title: BookReviews
BookReviews.description: Collection of community and scholar reviews written for a volume

reviews.description: List of review elements with rating, comment, and scholar name

/users/{userId}.description: User profiles stored in Firestore, accessible and modifiable by the profile owner

/carts/{userId}.description: Active carts containing book selections and counts

/wishlists/{userId}.description: Stored wishlists for books the user wishes to obtain

/progress/{userId}.description: User's current book reading progress and session statistics

/reviews/{bookId}.description: Public scholar book reviews submitted for specific volumes
